ground_truth.description: Photo of two people walking in Norwegian forest. All it should get without metadata. With metadata should get "marka" in Oslo, close to Sognsvann.
ground_truth.photographer_description: A photo of two people walking in Norwegian forest. This is all it should get without metadata. With metadata, it should get that it is «marka» in Oslo, close to Sognsvann. Around sunrise, clear skies.

details.description: Backlit scene on a narrow dirt hiking path through a dense boreal forest at golden hour. Tall coniferous trees (spruce/pine) and some birch rise around a mossy, bilberry-covered understory. Two hikers with backpacks are walking away from the camera; the low sun is visible between tree trunks with warm flare. No built structures or signage are visible—just the natural trail winding through woodland typical of Oslo’s Nordmarka near Sognsvann.

details.description: An early-evening woodland trail in a conifer forest. Two hikers with backpacks walk away from the camera along a narrow dirt path; tall evergreen trees rise on both sides with branches overhead. The low sun is visible through the trees, casting a warm orange glow and creating a lens flare. The ground is covered with low shrubs, moss, and scattered yellow flowers along the trail, suggesting a natural, lightly maintained forest path near a lakeside recreation area.

details.description: Two hikers walk along a narrow dirt path through a dense coniferous forest at sunset. The low orange sun glows between tall spruce and pine trunks, creating warm backlighting and a small lens flare. The forest floor is lush with green moss and low shrubs (bilberry/heather-like). The scene feels like a calm summer evening in a Scandinavian woodland near Oslo.

details.description: A vertical shot taken from a low angle on a forest trail, capturing two hikers walking away from the camera into a dense coniferous forest. The scene is backlit by the sun, which is low on the horizon (likely sunset), bursting through the tree trunks to create a warm glow and lens flare. The foreground features a dirt path flanked by lush green undergrowth, typical of Nordic forests, consisting of ferns and berry bushes. The primary subject is a person seen from behind wearing a green jacket, light-colored trousers, and a black backpack. A second person is partially visible to their right. The trees are tall, dark silhouettes against the bright sky.

details.description: A vertical photograph capturing a forest scene at sunset in Nordmarka, Oslo. The sun is positioned low on the horizon, its bright orange light filtering through a dense stand of coniferous trees, creating a prominent lens flare and long shadows. Two individuals are seen from behind, walking along a narrow dirt trail that winds through lush green undergrowth consisting of ferns and low-lying shrubs. The person in the foreground is wearing a dark green jacket, light-colored trousers, and a black backpack. The overall atmosphere is serene, highlighting the natural beauty of the Norwegian wilderness during the golden hour.

details.description: A forest trail scene at sunset: two hikers with backpacks walk away from the camera along a narrow dirt path. The surrounding is a dense coniferous forest with tall pines and branches arching overhead. The sun is low, peeking through the trees, creating orange lens flare and warm backlight that silhouettes the hikers slightly. The ground has low shrubs and moss; the atmosphere is tranquil and golden.

details.description: A quiet woodland scene at golden hour: a person with a backpack walks along a narrow dirt trail through a dense coniferous forest. Tall straight trunks and evergreen branches frame the low sun, which shines through the trees and casts warm orange light and lens flare across the foliage. The understory is lush with green shrubs, moss, and small plants. The path curves gently, and the overall mood is tranquil and outdoorsy, suggesting an evening or early morning hike in a temperate/boreal forest.

details.description: A forest trail scene with a dirt path winding through dense coniferous trees. The sun is low, peeking through the trunks and branches, creating a warm lens flare near the center-right. In the foreground to the right, two hikers stand with their backs to the camera, each wearing a backpack and outdoor clothing, seemingly looking toward the sunlit woods. The undergrowth is green with small shrubs and yellowish foliage along the edge of the trail.

details.description: A photograph, currently oriented sideways (rotated 90 degrees clockwise), depicting a serene forest scene during the golden hour. The sun is visible bursting through the trunks of tall, dark conifer trees in the background, creating a warm glow and a prominent red lens flare. The forest floor is densely covered with low-lying green shrubbery, typical of boreal undergrowth. In the foreground, two hikers are walking away from the camera along a narrow dirt path. The primary subject is seen from behind, wearing a green jacket, white or light grey trousers, and carrying a dark backpack.

details.description: A photograph, oriented 90 degrees counter-clockwise, depicting a dense coniferous forest at sunset. Two individuals are walking away from the camera along a narrow dirt trail. The person in the foreground is wearing a dark green jacket, white trousers, and a black backpack. The sun is low on the horizon, visible through the vertical trunks of the trees, creating a bright orange glow and a circular red lens flare. The forest floor is lush with green low-lying shrubs, likely bilberry or blueberry bushes. The trees are tall and slender, typical of a boreal or temperate needleleaf forest environment.
